task_completion.description: Open and modify the Dockerfile in the application directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, VS Code) or terminal command (e.g., cat, echo) showing the Dockerfile being edited in /home/ga/todo-app/.

task_completion.description: Rewrite the Dockerfile to use a multi-stage build.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the Dockerfile clearly showing at least two 'FROM' instructions (e.g., 'FROM node... AS build' followed by another 'FROM node...').

task_completion.description: Build and tag the optimized image as 'todo-app:optimized'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of a 'docker build -t todo-app:optimized .' command and the successful completion of the build steps.

task_completion.description: Verify the final image size is under 250 MB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of 'docker images' or 'docker image ls' showing the 'todo-app' repository with the 'optimized' tag and a size value less than 250MB.

task_completion.description: Verify the optimized image serves the application on port 3000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the container being run (e.g., 'docker run -p 3000:3000 todo-app:optimized') and a successful test of the application (e.g., 'curl http://localhost:3000' returning HTML/JSON, or a browser window displaying the app).

integrity.description: The agent actually edited the Dockerfile rather than just downloading a pre-made file or image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the file system and editing the Dockerfile manually or via script in the /home/ga/todo-app/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent built the image locally rather than just re-tagging an existing small image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal must show the standard Docker build output (e.g., transferring context, executing steps/layers) corresponding to the multi-stage Dockerfile.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the container and tested it, rather than faking the verification.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a 'docker run' command executing before the 'curl' or browser test, ensuring the response comes from the newly built container.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is located in /home/ga/todo-app. The optimized image must be tagged exactly as 'todo-app:optimized'. The final image size must be strictly less than 250 MB. The application listens internally on port 3000.
